{% extends 'base.html' %} {% block title %}{{ title }}{% endblock %} {% block content %}

{{ title }}

{{ form.hidden_tag() }}
{{ form.company_name.label(class="form-label") }} {{ form.company_name(class="form-control") }}
{{ form.contact_person.label(class="form-label") }} {{ form.contact_person(class="form-control") }}
{{ form.email.label(class="form-label") }} {{ form.email(class="form-control") }}
{{ form.phone.label(class="form-label") }} {{ form.phone(class="form-control") }}
{{ form.gstin.label(class="form-label") }} {{ form.gstin(class="form-control") }}
{{ form.category.label(class="form-label") }} {{ form.category(class="form-select") }}
{{ form.rating.label(class="form-label") }} {{ form.rating(class="form-control") }}
{{ form.is_approved(class="form-check-input") }} {{ form.is_approved.label(class="form-check-label") }}
{{ form.address.label(class="form-label") }} {{ form.address(class="form-control", rows="2") }}
{{ form.notes.label(class="form-label") }} {{ form.notes(class="form-control", rows="3") }}
Cancel
{% endblock %}
